caption: A man with a distinctive tall, grey, textured hairstyle and glasses wears a white button-down shirt, a red bowtie, and white suspenders. He is wearing black headphones and speaking into a black microphone positioned in front of him. He is located in a studio setting with a background featuring a grid of framed photographs and clothing items, including a shirt with the brand "LEE" visible. A red and white logo with the text "GOSS TALK JOT" and the word "PODCAST" underneath it appears in the lower-left and lower-right areas of the screen. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his head and mouth as he speaks, while the camera angle and the surrounding equipment and background remain static.
